requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Maldives BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为马尔代夫BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為馬爾地夫BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Maldives does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS product safety regulation. The Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) and Ministry of Environment regulate energy projects under the Energy Act (Law No. 9/2012) and associated regulations, but no specific mandatory pre-shipment conformity certification scheme for BESS cells or systems equivalent to Saudi SABER or the EU Battery Regulation has been confirmed from official sources. IMPORTANT: Maldives has no strong dedicated national standards body equivalent to ESMA (UAE), SASO (Saudi Arabia), or QGOSM (Qatar) — MEA functions as the energy regulator but standards publication capacity is limited. IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the IEC-aligned international baseline expected in ADB/AIIB project specifications and MEA project approvals for lithium BESS cells and modules. Project owners, EPCs, and development bank procurement officers in Maldives routinely reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical qualification prerequisite for BESS tenders. Exporters should verify the current MEA requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫尚无经确认的独立强制性国家BESS产品安全法规。马尔代夫能源局（MEA）和环境部依据《能源法》（第9/2012号法律）及相关法规对能源项目实施监管，但未从官方来源确认任何与沙特SABER或欧盟《电池法规》相当的BESS电芯或系统强制性装运前合格评定方案。重要提示：马尔代夫无等同于ESMA（阿联酋）、SASO（沙特阿拉伯）或QGOSM（卡塔尔）的强大专用国家标准机构——MEA作为能源监管机构发挥职能，但标准发布能力有限。IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是ADB/亚投行项目规格和MEA项目审批中预期的、符合IEC规范的锂BESS电芯和模组国际基准。马尔代夫的项目业主、EPC承包商和开发银行采购官员通常将IEC 62619合规作为BESS招标的技术资格前提。出口商在出货前应直接向MEA核实现行要求。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫尚無經確認的獨立強制性國家BESS產品安全法規。馬爾地夫能源局（MEA）和環境部依據《能源法》（第9/2012號法律）及相關法規對能源項目實施監管，但未從官方來源確認任何與沙特SABER或歐盟《電池法規》相當的BESS電芯或系統強制性裝運前合格評定方案。重要提示：馬爾地夫無等同於ESMA（阿聯酋）、SASO（沙特阿拉伯）或QGOSM（卡達）的強大專用國家標準機構——MEA作為能源監管機構發揮職能，但標準發布能力有限。IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是ADB/亞投行項目規格和MEA項目審批中預期的、符合IEC規範的鋰BESS電芯和模組國際基準。馬爾地夫的項目業主、EPC承包商和開發銀行採購官員通常將IEC 62619合規作為BESS招標的技術資格前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向MEA核實現行要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (IEC-aligned international baseline expected in Maldives BESS project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in ADB/AIIB project specifications)

Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) — national energy regulator under Ministry of Environment, Climate Change and Technology; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific conformity certification scheme as of dataset date
Energy Act (Law No. 9/2012) — primary legislative basis for MEA authority over energy projects in Maldives

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in electrical energy storage. Chinese cell safety is also referenced under GB 38031-2020 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery for Electric Vehicle) for EV-origin cells used in stationary applications. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62619 in Maldives project specifications or ADB/AIIB procurement requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为电化学储能中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。中国电芯安全还在固定式应用中使用的EV来源电芯方面参考GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）。上述中国标准在马尔代夫项目规格或ADB/亚投行采购要求中不被接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式测试证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為電化學儲能中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。中國電芯安全還在固定式應用中使用的EV來源電芯方面參考GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）。上述中國標準在馬爾地夫項目規格或ADB/亞投行採購要求中不被接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式測試證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery for Electric Vehicle; used for EV-origin cells in stationary BESS)

gap.en: Critical gap: Maldives project specifications and ADB/AIIB procurement requirements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB 38031-2020 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify directly with MEA whether any mandatory pre-shipment conformity certification obligation exists for BESS imported to Maldives; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Maldives BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or ADB/AIIB procurement document before committing to a test programme; (d) note that IEC 62619 high-temperature tests may not fully cover Maldives 35°C continuous ambient conditions — supplementary thermal qualification per IEC 60068-2-2 may be required by project specifications.
gap.zh: 关键差距：马尔代夫项目规格和ADB/亚投行采购要求将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接向MEA核实是否存在针对进口马尔代夫BESS的强制性装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至马尔代夫BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式测试证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或ADB/亚投行采购文件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意IEC 62619高温测试可能未完全涵盖马尔代夫35°C连续环境温度条件——项目规格可能要求按IEC 60068-2-2进行补充热资质认证。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：馬爾地夫項目規格和ADB/亞投行採購要求將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接向MEA核實是否存在針對進口馬爾地夫BESS的強制性裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至馬爾地夫BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式測試證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或ADB/亞投行採購文件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意IEC 62619高溫測試可能未完全涵蓋馬爾地夫35°C連續環境溫度條件——項目規格可能要求按IEC 60068-2-2進行補充熱資質認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ADB/AIIB or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; MEA mandatory pre-shipment regulatory certification obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with MEA. No strong national standards body equivalent to ESMA or QGOSM exists in Maldives
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as IEC 62619 equivalent in Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Maldives as of the dataset date, and Maldives lacks a strong dedicated national standards body. However, IEC 62619 is the IEC-aligned international baseline expected in ADB/AIIB project specifications and MEA project approvals for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Maldives project acceptance. Verify MEA current requirements and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, ADB/AIIB procurement officers, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，马尔代夫尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，且马尔代夫缺乏强大的专用国家标准机构。然而，IEC 62619是ADB/亚投行项目规格和MEA项目审批中针对BESS电芯和模组预期的IEC规范国际基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足马尔代夫项目验收要求。出货前请核实MEA现行要求，并向项目业主、ADB/亚投行采购官员及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，馬爾地夫尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，且馬爾地夫缺乏強大的專用國家標準機構。然而，IEC 62619是ADB/亞投行項目規格和MEA項目審批中針對BESS電芯和模組預期的IEC規範國際基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足馬爾地夫項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實MEA現行要求，並向項目業主、ADB/亞投行採購官員及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: BMS Safety and IEC 63056 — Battery Management System Requirements for Maldives Grid-Connected BESS
requirement_topic.zh: BMS安全与IEC 63056——马尔代夫并网BESS电池管理系统要求
requirement_topic.zht: BMS安全與IEC 63056——馬爾地夫併網BESS電池管理系統要求

summary.en: Battery management system (BMS) safety and performance is a critical compliance area for grid-connected BESS in Maldives. Project specifications for ADB/AIIB-funded island solar-plus-storage projects are expected to reference IEC 63056 (Secondary Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Connection to Utility Power Supply Networks), which covers BMS communication interfaces, protection function requirements, and grid-interconnection safety. IEC 62619 Section 5 also specifies BMS safety requirements including cell-level overcharge, over-discharge, and thermal protection functions. For Maldives atoll applications specifically, BMS high-temperature performance at sustained 35°C ambient temperatures is a project-critical design parameter: BMS must manage thermal runaway risk during peak solar hours with reduced active cooling efficiency. FENAKA and STELCO may specify BMS communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 or Modbus TCP) in connection agreements. No published Maldives national BMS standard has been identified; requirements are project-specific and IEC-aligned.
summary.zh: 电池管理系统（BMS）安全和性能是马尔代夫并网BESS合规的关键领域。ADB/亚投行资助的岛屿光储项目规格预计将引用IEC 63056（电化学储能系统用二次电池——接入公用电网要求），涵盖BMS通信接口、保护功能要求及并网安全。IEC 62619第5节还规定了包括电芯级过充、过放和热保护功能在内的BMS安全要求。尤其对于马尔代夫环礁应用，BMS在持续35°C环境温度下的高温性能是项目关键设计参数：BMS须在主动冷却效率降低的太阳能高峰时段管理热失控风险。FENAKA和STELCO可能在并网协议中规定BMS通信协议要求（IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）。未发现已公布的马尔代夫国家BMS标准；要求为项目专属且符合IEC规范。
summary.zht: 電池管理系統（BMS）安全和性能是馬爾地夫併網BESS合規的關鍵領域。ADB/亞投行資助的島嶼光儲項目規格預計將引用IEC 63056（電化學儲能系統用二次電池——接入公用電網要求），涵蓋BMS通訊接口、保護功能要求及併網安全。IEC 62619第5節還規定了包括電芯級過充、過放和熱保護功能在內的BMS安全要求。尤其對於馬爾地夫環礁應用，BMS在持續35°C環境溫度下的高溫性能是項目關鍵設計參數：BMS須在主動冷却效率降低的太陽能高峰時段管理熱失控風險。FENAKA和STELCO可能在併網協議中規定BMS通訊協議要求（IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）。未發現已公布的馬爾地夫國家BMS標準；要求為項目專屬且符合IEC規範。

standards_or_laws: IEC 63056 — Secondary Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Connection to Utility Power Supply Networks (BMS communication and grid-interconnection safety)
IEC 62619:2022 Section 5 — BMS safety requirements: overcharge, over-discharge, over-current, and thermal protection functions
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level BMS safety expectations)
IEC 61850 — Communication Networks and Systems for Power Utility Automation (communication protocol potentially required by STELCO/FENAKA)

summary.en: China's BMS standard for stationary BESS is GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage). It covers BMS hardware and software requirements, protection functions, communication interfaces, and environmental operating conditions. While technically substantive, GB/T 34131-2023 is structured around China's domestic grid characteristics and NEA approval procedures, and is not harmonised with IEC 63056. BMS communication protocols specified under GB/T 34131 (typically CAN bus and Modbus RTU for Chinese domestic systems) may differ from Maldives project specification requirements (IEC 61850 or Modbus TCP). Chinese BMS firmware protection thresholds validated for 25°C ambient conditions must be reviewed for Maldives 35°C continuous operation.
summary.zh: 中国固定式BESS的BMS标准为GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）。涵盖BMS硬件和软件要求、保护功能、通信接口及环境运行条件。尽管技术内容实质性强，GB/T 34131-2023围绕中国国内电网特性和NEA审批程序构建，与IEC 63056未协调。GB/T 34131规定的BMS通信协议（中国国内系统通常为CAN总线和Modbus RTU）可能与马尔代夫项目规格要求（IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）不同。在25°C环境条件下验证的中国BMS固件保护阈值须针对马尔代夫35°C连续运行进行审查。
summary.zht: 中國固定式BESS的BMS標準為GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）。涵蓋BMS硬件和軟件要求、保護功能、通訊接口及環境運行條件。儘管技術內容實質性強，GB/T 34131-2023圍繞中國國內電網特性和NEA審批程序構建，與IEC 63056未協調。GB/T 34131規定的BMS通訊協議（中國國內系統通常為CAN總線和Modbus RTU）可能與馬爾地夫項目規格要求（IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）不同。在25°C環境條件下驗證的中國BMS韌體保護閾值須針對馬爾地夫35°C連續運行進行審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage; voluntary)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 34131-2023 BMS compliance is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 63056 or the BMS requirements in IEC 62619 Section 5 in Maldives project specifications. Communication protocol mismatch (CAN/Modbus RTU vs IEC 61850/Modbus TCP) and high-temperature ambient performance at 35°C are project-critical gaps. Exporters should: (a) confirm IEC 63056 compliance evidence requirements with the project specification; (b) verify BMS communication protocol requirements with STELCO or FENAKA before equipment design is finalised; (c) conduct BMS functional testing at 40°C ambient and document cut-off and derating behaviour for Maldives thermal conditions; (d) confirm that BMS firmware version and protection settings are documented and locked — BMS firmware changes after IEC 62619 type-testing may require reassessment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 34131-2023 BMS合规在马尔代夫项目规格中不被接受为等同于IEC 63056或IEC 62619第5节BMS要求。通信协议不匹配（CAN/Modbus RTU对比IEC 61850/Modbus TCP）及35°C高温环境性能是项目关键差距。出口商应：（a）向项目规格确认IEC 63056合规证据要求；（b）在设备设计最终确定前向STELCO或FENAKA核实BMS通信协议要求；（c）在40°C环境下进行BMS功能测试，并记录马尔代夫热条件下的切断和降额行为；（d）确认BMS固件版本和保护设置已记录并锁定——IEC 62619型式测试后的BMS固件变更可能需要重新评估。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 34131-2023 BMS合規在馬爾地夫項目規格中不被接受為等同於IEC 63056或IEC 62619第5節BMS要求。通訊協議不匹配（CAN/Modbus RTU對比IEC 61850/Modbus TCP）及35°C高溫環境性能是項目關鍵差距。出口商應：（a）向項目規格確認IEC 63056合規證據要求；（b）在設備設計最終確定前向STELCO或FENAKA核實BMS通訊協議要求；（c）在40°C環境下進行BMS功能測試，並記錄馬爾地夫熱條件下的切斷和降額行為；（d）確認BMS韌體版本和保護設置已記錄並鎖定——IEC 62619型式測試後的BMS韌體變更可能需要重新評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — IEC 63056 and IEC 62619 BMS requirements are expected in ADB/AIIB project specifications; no standalone national Maldives BMS standard confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 34131-2023 is a voluntary standard; not accepted as IEC 63056 equivalent in Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34131-2023 BMS certification is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 63056 or IEC 62619 Section 5 BMS requirements in Maldives project specifications. BMS communication protocol mismatch and inadequate high-temperature ambient performance documentation are the most common project gaps. Confirm IEC 63056 requirements and STELCO/FENAKA communication protocol specifications at the earliest project stage. Document and test BMS thermal performance at 40°C ambient before ADB/AIIB tender submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34131-2023 BMS认证在马尔代夫项目规格中不被接受为等同于IEC 63056或IEC 62619第5节BMS要求。BMS通信协议不匹配和高温环境性能文件不足是最常见的项目差距。在项目最早阶段确认IEC 63056要求及STELCO/FENAKA通信协议规格。在提交ADB/亚投行招标书前，在40°C环境下记录并测试BMS热性能。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34131-2023 BMS認證在馬爾地夫項目規格中不被接受為等同於IEC 63056或IEC 62619第5節BMS要求。BMS通訊協議不匹配和高溫環境性能文件不足是最常見的項目差距。在項目最早階段確認IEC 63056要求及STELCO/FENAKA通訊協議規格。在提交ADB/亞投行招標書前，在40°C環境下記錄並測試BMS熱性能。

requirement_topic.en: Absence of a National Standards Body — Maldives BESS Regulatory Gap and Project-Specific Approach
requirement_topic.zh: 缺乏国家标准机构——马尔代夫BESS监管差距与项目专属方法
requirement_topic.zht: 缺乏國家標準機構——馬爾地夫BESS監管差距與項目專屬方法

summary.en: Maldives does not have a dedicated national standards body with the institutional capacity of ESMA (UAE), SASO (Saudi Arabia), QGOSM (Qatar), or BSI (UK). The Maldives Bureau of Standards (MBSL) exists under the Ministry of Economic Development but has limited published technical standards and has not confirmed BESS-specific mandatory product standards. The Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) is the relevant sector regulator but relies primarily on international standards (IEC series) referenced in project approval conditions rather than publishing stand-alone national BESS standards. This means: (a) there is no equivalent of Qatar's QGOSM product conformity assessment route for BESS; (b) there is no mandatory pre-shipment CoC or type-approval certificate requirement equivalent to Saudi SABER; (c) compliance is determined project-by-project, with ADB/AIIB procurement standards and project-owner specifications providing the effective compliance framework. This creates flexibility but also regulatory ambiguity — exporters must engage MEA and the project owner at the earliest possible stage to determine what documentary evidence will be required for a specific project.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫没有具备ESMA（阿联酋）、SASO（沙特阿拉伯）、QGOSM（卡塔尔）或BSI（英国）同等机构能力的专用国家标准机构。马尔代夫标准局（MBSL）隶属于经济发展部，但已公布的技术标准有限，未确认BESS专属强制性产品标准。马尔代夫能源局（MEA）是相关行业监管机构，但主要依赖项目审批条件中引用的国际标准（IEC系列），而非发布独立的国家BESS标准。这意味着：（a）没有等同于卡塔尔QGOSM针对BESS的产品合格评定路径；（b）没有等同于沙特SABER的强制性装运前合格证书或型式批准证书要求；（c）合规逐个项目确定，ADB/亚投行采购标准和项目业主规格提供实际合规框架。这带来灵活性，但也造成监管模糊——出口商必须在尽可能早的阶段与MEA和项目业主接触，确定具体项目将要求何种文件证据。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫沒有具備ESMA（阿聯酋）、SASO（沙特阿拉伯）、QGOSM（卡達）或BSI（英國）同等機構能力的專用國家標準機構。馬爾地夫標準局（MBSL）隸屬於經濟發展部，但已公布的技術標準有限，未確認BESS專屬強制性產品標準。馬爾地夫能源局（MEA）是相關行業監管機構，但主要依賴項目審批條件中引用的國際標準（IEC系列），而非發布獨立的國家BESS標準。這意味著：（a）沒有等同於卡達QGOSM針對BESS的產品合格評定路徑；（b）沒有等同於沙特SABER的強制性裝運前合格證書或型式批准證書要求；（c）合規逐個項目確定，ADB/亞投行採購標準和項目業主規格提供實際合規框架。這帶來靈活性，但也造成監管模糊——出口商必須在盡可能早的階段與MEA和項目業主接觸，確定具體項目將要求何種文件證據。

standards_or_laws: Maldives Bureau of Standards (MBSL) — national standards body under Ministry of Economic Development; limited BESS-specific published standards confirmed as of dataset date
Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) — energy sector regulator; no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product standard published as of dataset date
Energy Act (Law No. 9/2012) — primary legislative framework for MEA authority
ADB Procurement Policy (2017, as amended) — effective technical compliance framework for most utility-scale Maldives BESS projects

summary.en: China has a well-developed national standards system for BESS through the Standardization Administration of China (SAC), National Energy Administration (NEA), and China Electricity Council (CEC). Mandatory GB standards and voluntary GB/T standards exist across cells (GB 44240-2024), systems (GB/T 36558-2023), BMS (GB/T 34131-2023), and transport (GB regulations aligned with UN 38.3). Chinese BESS products typically hold an extensive portfolio of GB-series test certificates. These domestic certifications are technically comprehensive but are structured for China's regulatory environment and are not transferable to or recognised by MEA or ADB/AIIB project assessment processes as equivalents to IEC certifications.
summary.zh: 中国通过国家标准化管理委员会（SAC）、国家能源局（NEA）和中国电力企业联合会（CEC）建立了完善的BESS国家标准体系。电芯（GB 44240-2024）、系统（GB/T 36558-2023）、BMS（GB/T 34131-2023）及运输（与UN 38.3对齐的GB法规）均存在强制性GB标准和自愿性GB/T标准。中国BESS产品通常持有全面的GB系列测试证书。这些国内认证技术内容全面，但针对中国监管环境构建，不可转用于或被MEA或ADB/亚投行项目评估流程认可为IEC认证的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國通過國家標準化管理委員會（SAC）、國家能源局（NEA）和中國電力企業聯合會（CEC）建立了完善的BESS國家標準體系。電芯（GB 44240-2024）、系統（GB/T 36558-2023）、BMS（GB/T 34131-2023）及運輸（與UN 38.3對齊的GB法規）均存在強制性GB標準和自願性GB/T標準。中國BESS產品通常持有全面的GB系列測試證書。這些國內認證技術內容全面，但針對中國監管環境構建，不可轉用於或被MEA或ADB/亞投行項目評估流程認可為IEC認證的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: Standardization Administration of China (SAC) — publishes GB and GB/T BESS standards
National Energy Administration (NEA) — governs grid-connection approval for BESS in China
GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36558-2023 / GB/T 34131-2023 — principal China BESS standards portfolio

gap.en: Gap: The absence of a strong Maldives national standards body means there is no published mandatory BESS product certification route equivalent to SABER or QGOSM. This creates regulatory ambiguity that cannot be resolved by reference to a single published national standard. The practical implication for exporters is: (a) project-specific due diligence is unavoidable — contact MEA and the project owner early; (b) IEC 62619, IEC 62933, and IEC 63056 certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories provide the strongest universally recognised evidence base that MEA and ADB/AIIB project assessors will accept; (c) do not assume that the absence of a mandatory pre-shipment certification means no documentation is required — project contracts will specify technical evidence requirements independently of any national regulation; (d) monitor MEA regulatory developments, as Maldives is actively expanding its energy regulatory framework under ADB technical assistance programmes.
gap.zh: 差距：马尔代夫缺乏强大国家标准机构，意味着没有等同于SABER或QGOSM的已公布强制性BESS产品认证路径。这造成的监管模糊无法通过参考单一已公布国家标准来解决。对出口商的实际影响：（a）项目专属尽职调查不可避免——尽早与MEA和项目业主联系；（b）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619、IEC 62933和IEC 63056证书提供MEA和ADB/亚投行项目评估人员最可能接受的最强通用认可证据基础；（c）不要假设不存在强制性装运前认证就意味着不需要文件——项目合同将独立于任何国家法规规定技术证据要求；（d）监测MEA监管进展，因为马尔代夫正在ADB技术援助计划下积极扩展其能源监管框架。
gap.zht: 差距：馬爾地夫缺乏強大國家標準機構，意味著沒有等同於SABER或QGOSM的已公布強制性BESS產品認證路徑。這造成的監管模糊無法通過參考單一已公布國家標準來解決。對出口商的實際影響：（a）項目專屬盡職調查不可避免——盡早與MEA和項目業主聯繫；（b）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619、IEC 62933和IEC 63056證書提供MEA和ADB/亞投行項目評估人員最可能接受的最強通用認可證據基礎；（c）不要假設不存在強制性裝運前認證就意味著不需要文件——項目合同將獨立於任何國家法規規定技術證據要求；（d）監測MEA監管進展，因為馬爾地夫正在ADB技術援助計畫下積極擴展其能源監管框架。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory national pre-shipment certification route for BESS as of dataset date — project-specific requirements determined by MEA project approval conditions and ADB/AIIB procurement standards; verify directly with MEA and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese domestic mandatory standards (GB 44240-2024 etc.) apply within China; not recognised in Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Maldives has no dedicated national standards body with the capacity to publish mandatory BESS product standards, and no confirmed mandatory pre-shipment BESS certification route has been identified as of the dataset date. This does not mean compliance documentation is optional — project contract requirements and MEA project approval conditions specify evidence independently of national regulation. The strongest universally accepted evidence base is IEC 62619 + IEC 62933 + IEC 63056 from ILAC-accredited laboratories. Engage MEA and the project owner at the earliest project stage to determine actual documentary requirements for each specific project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马尔代夫没有具备发布强制性BESS产品标准能力的专用国家标准机构，截至本数据集日期尚未确认强制性装运前BESS认证路径。这并不意味着合规文件是可选的——项目合同要求和MEA项目审批条件独立于国家法规规定证据要求。最强的通用认可证据基础是来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619 + IEC 62933 + IEC 63056。在项目最早阶段与MEA和项目业主接触，确定每个具体项目的实际文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬爾地夫沒有具備發布強制性BESS產品標準能力的專用國家標準機構，截至本數據集日期尚未確認強制性裝運前BESS認證路徑。這並不意味著合規文件是可選的——項目合同要求和MEA項目審批條件獨立於國家法規規定證據要求。最強的通用認可證據基礎是來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619 + IEC 62933 + IEC 63056。在項目最早階段與MEA和項目業主接觸，確定每個具體項目的實際文件要求。
